Footer.tagline: Exquisite luxury retreats for the discerning traveler. Experience serenity in the world's most beautiful destinations.

hero.title: Your Private Coastal Sanctuary
hero.subtitle: Discover an unparalleled retreat where modern luxury meets the timeless beauty of the coast. Experience world-class service in the complete privacy of Anna Villa.

about.title: Architectural Harmony with Nature
about.description1: Nestled on a secluded cliffside, Anna Villa represents the pinnacle of Mediterranean living. The architecture utilizes local materials, blending seamless glass walls with organic stone to create a continuous flow between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
about.description2: Designed for those who seek the extraordinary, every corner of the villa has been curated to offer unobstructed views of the horizon, ensuring that nature's beauty is always the center of attention.

019.title: Villa Sapphire - Ocean Sanctuary
019.description: Nestled on the sun-drenched cliffs, Villa 019 is a masterwork of contemporary Mediterranean architecture. Designed to erase the boundaries between indoor luxury and the vast blue horizon, every room offers panoramic views of the sea.

057.title: Villa Emerald - Jungle Oasis
057.description: Experience the pinnacle of tropical luxury at Villa 057. Surrounded by lush emerald foliage, this estate blends natural dark wood architecture with high-end modern amenities, creating a serene sanctuary in the heart of nature.

pool.title: Infinity Edge Pool
pool.description: Heated saltwater pool that disappears into the horizon, surrounded by a private sun terrace and cabanas.

golf.title: Private Golf Links
golf.description: Access to a world-class 9-hole course designed for exclusivity and challenge, with stunning ocean views.

chef.title: Private Chef Service
chef.description: Bespoke culinary journeys prepared daily by our Michelin-trained resident chef using organic local harvest.

testimonials.quote: A true masterpiece of hospitality. The privacy and the view at Anna Villa are beyond anything we've experienced in the Mediterranean. Truly an unforgettable sanctuary.
testimonials.author: The Alexander Family

cta.title: Ready for the Extraordinary?
cta.subtitle: Our concierge is standing by to curate your perfect escape. Limited seasonal availability for 2024.

description.title: Unrivaled Coastal Elegance
description.paragraph1: Nestled on the sun-drenched cliffs of the Amalfi Coast, Villa Sapphire is a masterwork of contemporary Mediterranean architecture. Designed to erase the boundaries between indoor luxury and the vast blue horizon, every room offers panoramic views of the sea.
description.paragraph2: Whether you're lounging by the infinity pool, hosting a private chef's dinner in the gourmet kitchen, or retreating to the spa-like sanctuary of the master suite, Villa Sapphire provides an atmosphere of absolute tranquility and refined sophistication.

booking.noPayment: No payment charged until confirmation from host

hero.title: Experience Excellence
hero.subtitle: Experience the pinnacle of coastal luxury. Our team is ready to curate your bespoke escape to the Anna Villa.

rates.title: Seasonal Rates
rates.disclaimer: * Rates exclude local taxes and a 5% service fee. Minimum 3-night stay required.

form.title: Inquiry Form
form.placeholderRequests: Tell us about any specific requirements or occasions...

hero.title: Atmosphere & Architecture
hero.subtitle: Explore the meticulously curated spaces of Anna Villa, where modern luxury meets the timeless tranquility of the coast.

hero.title: Curated Amenities
hero.subtitle: Discover a sanctuary of refined elegance where every detail is meticulously crafted for your ultimate coastal retreat at Anna Villa.

intro.title: World-Class Services at Your Fingertips
intro.description: Anna Villa offers more than just a place to stay. We provide a bespoke hospitality experience that blends the comforts of home with the luxuries of a five-star resort. From our pristine private sands to the master-chef equipped kitchen, every space is designed for serenity.
intro.testimonial: A level of privacy and service that redefined our expectations of luxury.
intro.author: The Henderson Family

pool.title: Private Pool
pool.description: A temperature-controlled infinity edge pool overlooking the ocean, featuring underwater lighting and a spacious sun deck.

golf.title: Golf Access
golf.description: Exclusive membership privileges at the adjacent championship coastal links, including priority tee times.

beach.title: Beach Access
beach.description: A private staircase leads directly to a secluded stretch of pristine white sand beach, reserved exclusively for guests.

kitchen.title: Gourmet Kitchen
kitchen.description: A chef-designed culinary space featuring Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances, perfect for hosting or professional catering.

bbq.title: BBQ Lounge
bbq.description: An alfresco dining pavilion equipped with a professional-grade grill, wet bar, and lounge seating for twelve guests.

spa.title: In-Villa Spa Treatments
spa.description: Bring the luxury of the spa to your bedroom with our professional therapists and custom botanical treatments.

transport.title: Luxury Transport
transport.description: Private airport transfers and luxury car rentals on request.

nanny.title: Nanny Services
nanny.description: Certified, bilingual child care professionals available daily.

experiences.title: Curated Local Experiences
experiences.description: Let our concierge arrange private yacht charters, vineyard tours, or guided historical walks through the coast's hidden gems.

hero.title: A Coastal Sanctuary
hero.subtitle: Discover the unparalleled serenity of NovaWorld Phan Thiet, where the horizon meets the shore in a dance of light and luxury.

destination.title: The Destination
destination.address: Lạc Long Quân, Tiến Thành, Thành phố Phan Thiết, Bình Thuận. Situated in the heart of the prestigious NovaWorld development.
destination.airportDesc: 2.5 hours from Tan Son Nhat (HCMC) via the newly opened Phan Thiet-Dau Giay Expressway.
destination.landDesc: Easy access via coastal highway. Valet parking and private driver services are available upon request.

highlights.title: NovaWorld Phan Thiet
highlights.subtitle: A world-class integrated resort city spanning 1,000 hectares of pristine coastline and entertainment.

waterPark.title: Wonderland Water Park
waterPark.description: Exhilarating aquatic adventures just minutes from your villa.

themePark.title: Circus Land
themePark.description: International-standard amusement park with iconic fairground rides.

concierge.title: Bespoke Guidance
concierge.description: Our dedicated concierge team is at your disposal to arrange private transfers, theme park tickets, or custom local tours throughout your stay.
